mappings.ibex_signal: priv_mode_id_o == PRIV_LVL_U && csr_op_en_i && (csr_op_i == CSR_OP_WRITE || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_SET || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_CLEAR)
mappings.notes: Mapped NS31A UserMode to Ibex priv_mode_id_o == PRIV_LVL_U. Mapped CsrWriteOp to csr_op_en_i with write-type operations. Uses illegal_csr_insn_o as observable consequence of privilege violation.

mappings.ibex_signal: csr_addr_i != CSR_MSTATUS && csr_op_en_i && (csr_op_i == CSR_OP_WRITE || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_SET || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_CLEAR)
mappings.notes: Mapped to check that writes to CSR_MSTATUS only occur when csr_addr_i matches. Uses csr_rdata_o stability as observable consequence.
Checks that reads from CSR_MSTATUS only occur when csr_addr_i matches. Uses csr_rdata_o as observable read data.

mappings.ns31a_signal: CSRRW, CSRRS, CSRRC, CSRRWI, CSRRSI, CSRRCI
mappings.ibex_signal: csr_op_en_i && (csr_op_i == CSR_OP_READ || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_WRITE || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_SET || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_CLEAR)
mappings.notes: Mapped NS31A CSR instruction types to Ibex csr_op_e enum values. Checks that CSR reads only occur during valid CSR operations.

mappings.ns31a_signal: CSRRW, CSRRS, CSRRC, CSRRWI, CSRRSI, CSRRCI
mappings.ibex_signal: csr_op_en_i && (csr_op_i == CSR_OP_WRITE || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_SET || csr_op_i == CSR_OP_CLEAR)
mappings.notes: Mapped NS31A CSR instruction types to Ibex csr_op_e enum values. Checks that CSR writes only occur during valid CSR operations.

mappings.ibex_signal: csr_addr_i == CSR_MVENDORID || csr_addr_i == CSR_MARCHID || csr_addr_i == CSR_MIMPID || csr_addr_i == CSR_MHARTID
mappings.notes: Mapped NS31A read-only CSR addresses to Ibex csr_num_e enum values. Checks that read-only CSRs return constant values.
Mapped NS31A mie register fields to Ibex csr_rdata_o when reading CSR_MIE. Checks reserved bits are zero.
Mapped NS31A exception flag for write to read-only CSR to Ibex illegal_csr_insn_o output signal.
Mapped NS31A exception flag for non-existent CSR access to Ibex illegal_csr_insn_o output signal.
Mapped NS31A exception flag for privilege violation to Ibex illegal_csr_insn_o output signal.
